texto: It is not enough for the Jew to rest content with his own spiritual ascent, the elevation of his soul in closeness to G-d, he must strive to draw spirituality down into the world and into every part of it – the world of his work and his social life – until not only do they not distract him from his pursuit of G-d, but they become a full part of it.
explicacao: Orientação direta de (R. Menachem M. Schneerson) sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “It is not enough for the Jew to rest content with his own spiritual ascent, the elevation of his …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a espiritualidade, inspiracional, judaism, útil em momentos de inspiracao e trabalho.
